tigrinya.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: ህነጽ • ደጋግም • ቅዳሕ • ተርጉም • ኣቐይር • CRISPR • ስነ ፍትሒ
tigrinya.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A ምስ T ይጻመድ (2 bond)፣ G ምስ C (3)። Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) ነዚ ቅርጺ ብX-ray crystallography ፈትሕዎ። እቲ ቅርጺ DNA ከመይ ከም ዝድገምን ከም ዝንበብን የርኢ።
tigrinya.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase ነቶም strand ይፈላሊ፤ DNA polymerase ምሉእ strand ይሃንጽ። Semi-conservative — ነፍሲ ወከፍ ሓድሽ helix ሓደ ኣረጊት strand + ሓደ ሓድሽ ኣለዎ። Meselson ን Stahl ን ብ1958 ኣረጋገጽዎ።
tigrinya.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase ሓደ DNA strand 3′→5′ የንብብ፣ RNA ድማ 5′→3′ ይሃንጽ። እቶም ፊደላት ሓደ እዮም፣ ጥራይ T ናብ U ይቕየር። mRNA ነቲ መምርሒ ክሳብ ribosome ይጸውር — ቀዳማይ ስጉምቲ ናይ central dogma።
tigrinya.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: 64 codon → 20 amino acid (genetic code ትርፊ እዩ)። AUG ይጅምር፤ UAA/UAG/UGA የቋርጹ። tRNA codon የንብብ፣ ቅኑዕ amino acid የምጽእ፣ peptide bond ይሃንጽ።
tigrinya.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — ሓደ ፊደል ተቐዪሩ። Insertion/deletion — reading frame ይንቀሳቐስ፣ ካብኡ ንደሓር ዘሎ protein ኩሉ ይበላሾ። Sickle cell anemia ሓደ A→T ጥራይ እዩ — ሓደ ፊደል፣ ኣብ ምሉእ ህይወት ጽልዋ።
tigrinya.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: ናይ ባክተርያ ስርዓት ምክልኻል ሕማም ንኻልእ ዕላማ ተቐዪሩ። Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = molecular መቐስ። Doudna + Charpentier ብ2020 Nobel ተዓወቱ። እታ ቀዳመይቲ CRISPR therapy (sickle cell) ብFDA ኣብ ታሕሳስ 2023 ጸደቐት።
tigrinya.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence structure ይውስን፣ structure ዕዮ ይውስን። Hemoglobin O₂ ይጸውር፣ antibody ይፈሊ፣ enzyme catalyze ይገብር። AlphaFold (2020) 200 ሚልዮን structure ተነበየ — ናይ 50 ዓመት ጸገም ኣብ 18 ወርሒ ተፈትሐ።
tigrinya.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: ስነ ፍትሒ — STR profiling + መርትዖ DNA
tigrinya.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS 20 short tandem repeat (STR) loci ይጥቀም። ኩሎም loci ክሰማምዑ ከለዉ ናይ ኣጋጣሚ ተመሳሳልነት ዕድል ካብ quadrillion ሓደ እዩ። Innocence Project — ካብ 245 ንላዕሊ ግጉይ ፍርድታት ድሕሪ ናይ DNA መርመራ ተሰሪዞም።
tigrinya.practice_transcription_translation_mut: transcription፣ translation፣ ምፍላይ mutation ተለማመድ። AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (ሓሓሊፉ RNA) መሰረት ምትሕልላፍ ሓበሬታ ውርሻ እዩ። NGSS HS-LS3-1።
tigrinya.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: ልምምድ ምዝካር — ብመልክዕ ጸወታ። ቅልጣፈ automaticity ይሃንጽ — codon table ምርኣይ ባዕሉ ክኸውን ከሎ፣ working memory ኻ ከም ምንባይ ጽልዋ mutation ንዝኣመሰለ ላዕለዋይ ኣተሓሳስባ ናጻ ይኸውን።
tigrinya.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — retrovirus (HIV) ሓዊሱ ብreverse transcriptase ንድሕሪት ይምለስ። Crick ነታ "dogma" ትብል ቃል ብ1957 ፈጠረ፤ ጸኒሑ ግምት ማለት ምዃኑ፣ ዘይክሓድ ሓቂ ከም ዘይኮነ ተዛረበ።
tigrinya.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: sequence ምረጽ — complementary strand ብbase pairing ይመላእ (A-T, G-C)። ናይ ሓቂ DNA ወትሩ በዚ መንገዲ ይህነጽ።
tigrinya.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase helix ይኸፍት፤ DNA polymerase ነፍሲ ወከፍ template strand የንብብን መመላእታኡ ይሃንጽን። Semi-conservative — ነፍሲ ወከፍ daughter strand ሓደ ኣረጊት + ሓደ ሓድሽ ኣለዎ።
tigrinya.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase template strand የንብብ። ተመሳሳሊ ሕጊ complementarity፣ ግን T → U። ውጽኢት — ሓደ single-strand mRNA copy፣ ካብ nucleus ንምውጻእ ድሉው።
tigrinya.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome codon የንብብ (ኣብ ሓደ ግዜ 3 base)። ነፍሲ ወከፍ codon → ሓደ amino acid። Genetic code ከም ዘይደራረብ፣ ኮማ ዘይብሉ triplet ይንበብ።
tigrinya.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ኣይቅየርን)፣ missense (ዝተፈልየ amino acid)፣ nonsense (ኣቐዲሙ ምቁራጽ)። Frameshift (insertion/deletion) መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ኣዕናዊ እዩ።
tigrinya.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA ንCas9 ናብ 20-base target ይመርሕ። Cas9 ንኽልቲኡ strand ይቖርጽ። ናይ ዋህዮ repair pathway gene ይዓጹ ወይ ነቲ ዝሃብካዮ template ይውስኽ።
tigrinya.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (3D ምዕጻፍ) → quaternary (multi-subunit)። ሓደ amino acid ምቕያር ነቲ ምዕጻፍ ከበላሽዎ ይኽእል።
tigrinya.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — 13-20 short tandem repeat loci። ኣብ ኩሎም loci ናይ ኣጋጣሚ ተመሳሳልነት ዕድል ካብ ቢልዮን ሓደ ዝኣክል እዩ። ኣብ CODIS፣ paternity test፣ ን forensic lab ን ይጥቀም።
tigrinya.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ session ሓድሽ ናይ DNA ሕንቅልሕንቅሊተይ። ተርጉም፣ mutation ፍለ፣ ORF ድለ ወይ forensic ጉዳይ ፍታሕ። Streak counter ናይ መዓልቲ ዓወት ይከታተል።
tigrinya.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: ናይ ቅልጣፈ translation ውድድር። ምስ ሰዓት እናተወዳደርካ codon ብቕልጡፍ decode ግበር። genetic code ኣብ ኣእምሮኻ ከም ዘሎ ፈትን፣ ብreference card ጥራይ ዘይኮነ።
tigrinya.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table፣ ሕግታት base pairing፣ ቁልፊ ቃላት (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — ተመሊስካ እትርእዮ cheat sheet።
tigrinya.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA copy ናይ coding strand እዩ፣ U ንቦታ T ይሕዝ። (RNA polymerase complementary template strand 3'→5' የንብብ፣ ምስ coding strand ተመሳሳሊ sequence ይህብ።)
tigrinya.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ PAM site (NGG) ኣይተረኽበን። ካብ Build tab ዝተፈልየ DNA sequence ፈትን።
tigrinya.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Double-strand break ተፈጢሩ! repair pathway ምረጽ:
tigrinya.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) ካብ ናይ ባክተርያ ምክልኻል ሕማም ዝመጸ gene-editing technology እዩ።
tigrinya.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™)፣ cancer immunotherapy፣ ምህንድስና እኽሊ፣ model ሕማማት።
tigrinya.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
tigrinya.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
tigrinya.run_transcription_and_translation_firs: ቅድም ኢልካ Transcription ን Translation ን ኣካይድ!
tigrinya.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: 10 mutation vignette። ነፍሲ ወከፍ ነቲ ለውጢ ዝሪኢ ሓጺር DNA sequence ምስ before/after የርኢ። ዓይነት ጽልዋ ምረጽ — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, ወይ in-frame indel። ድሕሪ ምምራጽ coaching እዚ ጽልዋ ካብቶም ካልኦት ንምንታይ ዝያዳ ዕድል ከም ዘለዎ የብርህ።
tigrinya.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ phosphorylated።
tigrinya.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: disulfide bond (S-S) ይፈጥር። ንprotein folding ወሳኒ።
tigrinya.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic። እቲ ዝዓበየ amino acid።
tigrinya.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain። active site ናይ ብዙሓት enzyme (pKa ~7)።
tigrinya.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ acetylated/methylated።
tigrinya.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group። 6 codon — ኣዝዩ degenerate።
tigrinya.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: እቲ ዝነኣሰ። side chain የብሉን — ላዕለዋይ flexibility።
tigrinya.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase double helix ኣብ replication origin ይኸፍት። Single-strand binding protein re-annealing ይኽልክል። Topoisomerase ካብ fork ቅድሚት supercoil tension ይንኪ።
tigrinya.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase ሓጺር RNA primer (~10 nt) የቐምጥ — DNA polymerase ንextend 3'-OH የድልዮ፣ ስለዚ ሓድሽ strand ባዕሉ ክጅምር ኣይክእልን።
tigrinya.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: replication fork ኣብ ዝንቀሳቐሰሉ ኣንፈት 5'→3' ብቐጻሊ ይህነጽ። ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ origin ሓደ primer።
tigrinya.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: polymerase 5'→3' ጥራይ ስለ ዝextend ከም ሓጺር 100-1000 nt fragment (Okazaki fragment) ይህነጽ። ነፍሲ ወከፍ fragment ናይ ገዛእ ርእሱ primer የድልዮ።
tigrinya.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: RNA primer ይቑረጽ ብDNA nucleotide ይትካእ።
tigrinya.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: ነቲ ናይ መወዳእታ phosphodiester bond ብምፍጣር Okazaki fragment የራኽብ።
tigrinya.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase ነፍሲ ወከፍ base ይምርምር፤ mismatch ይውጻእ ይትካእ። error rate ካብ ~10⁻⁵ ናብ ~10⁻⁷ ይንኪ።
tigrinya.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: proofreading ዘምለጡ ውሑዳት mismatch ይሕዝ። ናይ መወዳእታ error rate — ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ base pair ~10⁻¹⁰።
tigrinya.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase promoter ይሕዝ (ንኣብነት TATA box ~25 bp upstream ካብ transcription start)። DNA double helix ንምምዝማዝ ይሕግዝ።
tigrinya.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase template strand 3'→5' የንብብ mRNA 5'→3' ይሃንጽ። ኣብ ባክተርያ ኣብ ካልኢት ~30 nucleotide ይውስኽ፤ ኣብ eukaryote ~10-50።
tigrinya.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: ባክተርያ — rho-dependent ወይ intrinsic termination (hairpin loop)። Eukaryote — cleavage ን polyadenylation signal ን።
tigrinya.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: 7-methylguanosine cap ኣብ 5' end ይውሰኽ። ribosome ንmRNA ክፈሊ ይሕግዝ + ካብ degradation ይሕሉ።
tigrinya.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Intron ይውጻእ፣ exon ብspliceosome ይራኸብ። Alternative splicing → ካብ ሓደ gene ብዙሕ protein።
tigrinya.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: ~100-250 adenine nucleotide ኣብ 3' end ይውሰኽ። mRNA የረጋግእ + export ይሕብር።
tigrinya.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: ዝበሰለ mRNA ብnuclear pore ኣቢሉ ናብ cytoplasm ይወጽእ።
tigrinya.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit mRNA ይሕዝ። Initiator tRNA (Met ጸይሩ) start codon AUG ይሕዝ። Large subunit ይጽንበር።
tigrinya.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: ነፍሲ ወከፍ ዙር — aminoacyl-tRNA ናብ A site ይኣቱ → peptide bond ይፍጠር (23S rRNA catalyze ይገብር፣ ribozyme) → ribosome ሓደ codon ይንቀሳቐስ → tRNA A→P→E ይኸይድ።
tigrinya.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) ብrelease factor ይፍለጥ። Peptide ይልቀቕ፣ ribosome ይፈላለ።
tigrinya.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) protein ብቕኑዕ ክዕጸፍ ይሕግዝ። Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond።
tigrinya.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon ይቕየር፣ ግን amino acid ሓደ እዩ (genetic code redundancy)። ጽልዋ የብሉን።
tigrinya.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon ይቕየር → ዝተፈልየ amino acid። ጽልዋ ካብ ዘይምንም (conservative substitution) ክሳብ ከቢድ (sickle cell — Glu→Val)።
tigrinya.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon ይቕየር → STOP codon። Protein ይቑረጽ፣ መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ non-functional።
tigrinya.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: nucleotide ይውስኽ። ናይ 3 multiple እንተ ዘይኮይኑ reading frame ይንቀሳቐስ → ካብኡ ንደሓር ዘለዉ codon ኩሎም ይቕየሩ። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ከቢድ።
tigrinya.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: nucleotide የውጽእ። ምስ insertion ተመሳሳሊ frameshift ውጽኢት።
tigrinya.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: ተወሳኺ copy ናይ gene ወይ region። dosage effect ከስዕብ ይኽእል (Down syndrome = ተወሳኺ chromosome 21)።
tigrinya.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: ክፋል chromosome ተገምጢሉ። ኣብ breakpoint gene ከበላሹ ይኽእል።
tigrinya.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: ክፋል ናብ ካልእ chromosome ይንቀሳቐስ። ፍሉጥ — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion)።
tigrinya.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: ተደጋጋሚ unit (ንኣብነት CAG) ኣብ ወለዶታት ይስፋሕ። Huntington (CAG ኣብ HTT)፣ fragile X (CGG ኣብ FMR1)፣ myotonic dystrophy።
tigrinya.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: ጽምድታት 1-22 (ብግምት ብመጠን ተቖጺሮም፣ ምስ exception — chr. 21 ካብ chr. 22 ይነኣሰ)።
tigrinya.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (ኣንስተይቲ) ወይ XY (ተባዕታይ)። Y ኣዝዩ ይነኣሰ፣ ምስ X (~800) ክነጻጸር ከሎ ውሑዳት gene (~70) ይጸውር።
tigrinya.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: 23 ጽምዲ (ኣብ somatic cell diploid)። Gamete haploid እዩ (23 chromosome፣ ጽምዲ የብሉን)።
tigrinya.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: ብዘገርም ውሑድ — ብዙሓት gene ብalternative splicing ብዙሕ protein የፍርዩ። እቲ ዝዓበየ ክፋል genome regulatory ወይ non-coding እዩ።
tigrinya.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: እንተ ተዘርጊሑ ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ ዋህዮ ~1.8 m DNA። ብhistone + supercoiling ኣብ ~10 µm nucleus ይዕጸፍ።
tigrinya.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: ካብ ኣደ ይወርስ። 37 gene ይኮድ (13 protein, 22 tRNA, 2 rRNA)። ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ mitochondrion ብዙሕ copy።
tigrinya.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: ፍሉይ DNA segment ብ2ⁿ (n ዙር) የብዝሕ። ሙቐት ዝጻወር Taq polymerase ይጥቀም። መሰረት ናይ ዘመናዊ molecular biology።
tigrinya.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide ብምጥቃም DNA sequence የንብብ። Read length ~800-1000 bp። ሕጂ መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ብnext-generation sequencing ተተኪኡ።
tigrinya.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — ኣብ ሓደ ግዜ ሚልዮናት fragment sequence ይገብር። Illumina ይመርሕ። Read length ~100-300 bp፣ ኣብ ነፍሲ ወከፍ run ቢልዮናት።
tigrinya.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing። Guide RNA ንnuclease Cas9 ናብ ፍሉይ DNA ይመርሕ። Cut gene knockout ወይ HDR-mediated insertion ይገብር። Nobel 2020።
tigrinya.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: ሓደ base ብዘይ double-strand break የስተኻኽል። ካብ Cas9 ዝወሓደ off-target effect።
tigrinya.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: DNA ኣብ ፍሉይ sequence 4-8 bp ዝቖርጹ protein ባክተርያ። recombinant DNA technology ኣኽኣሉ። Nobel 1978።
tigrinya.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: DNA fragment ብphosphodiester bond የራኽብ። T4 DNA ligase workhorse ናይ cloning እዩ።
tigrinya.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: DNA fragment ብመጠን ኣብ electric field ይፈሊ። ንእሽቶ fragment ኣብ gel matrix ብቕልጡፍ ይንቀሳቐስ።
tigrinya.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: ኣሽሓት DNA probe ኣብ chip። gene expression ይmeasure ወይ SNP ብparallel detect ይገብር።
tigrinya.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: ካብ ውልቀ ዋህዮ mRNA sequence ይገብር። ነቲ bulk RNA-seq ዝስሕቶ cell-type heterogeneity ይገልጽ።
tigrinya.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: ብዘይ crystallization ናይ RNA/DNA complex near-atomic structure። ንribosome, spliceosome, replisome ሓያል።
tigrinya.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length ክሳብ 100 kb+ (ምስ Illumina ~300 bp ክነጻጸር ከሎ)። ንstructural variant, repeat, full-length transcript ዝሓሸ።
tigrinya.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: ኣብ ዝወርስ variation ዝተመስረተ ዝተፈላለየ reproduction። survival/reproduction ዘመሓይሹ gene ኣብ ወለዶታት ልሙዳት ይኾኑ።
tigrinya.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: ናይ ሓድሽ genetic variation ዘፈቐደ ምንጪ። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ neutral ወይ ጎዳኢ፤ ሓሓሊፉ ጠቓሚ። substrate ናይ selection።
tigrinya.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: ኣብ allele frequency ዘፈቐደ ለውጥታት፣ ብፍላይ ኣብ ንእሽቶ population። Founder effect + bottleneck ጽንፈኛ ኣብነታት እዮም።
tigrinya.movement_of_alleles_between_population: ብmigration ኣብ መንጎ population ናይ allele ምንቅስቓስ። ኣብ መንጎ population ፍልልይ ይንኪ፤ ኣብ ውሽጢ population diversity ይውስኽ።
tigrinya.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: ናይ ሓድሽ species ምፍጣር፣ መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ብreproductive isolation። Allopatric (ጂኦግራፊያዊ ምፍልላይ) ኣዝዩ ልሙድ እዩ።
tigrinya.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: ዝምድና ዘይብሎም organism ተመሳሳሊ ባህርያት ብናጻ የማዕብሉ (ኣኽናፍ ኣዕዋፍ፣ መንካዕ፣ ሓሳኹ፤ ዓይኒ vertebrate + cephalopod)።
tigrinya.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: ህይወት ኩሉ ሓባራዊ ኣቦ ይካፈል (LUCA)። መርትዖ — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, ሓባራዊ መሰረታዊ biochemistry።
tigrinya.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: ናይ evolution ዝምድና ዝሪኢ ንድፊ። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ካብ morphology ንላዕሊ ብDNA sequence ንጽጽር ይህነጽ።
tigrinya.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency ኣብ ትሕቲ no-evolution ግምታት ቀዋሚ ይኸውን — ዓቢ population, random mating, ብዘይ selection/mutation/migration/drift። p² + 2pq + q² = 1።
tigrinya.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Interactive መወከሲታት — ንምድህሳስ ካብ ታሕቲ ኣርእስቲ ምረጽ።
tigrinya.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: ሓሙሽተ nitrogenous base DNA + RNA ይሰርሑ — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA)። Purine (A, G) 2 ring ኣለዎም፤ pyrimidine (T, U, C) 1። Pairing ብፍሉይ H-bond pattern።
tigrinya.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: 64 codon (4³) 20 amino acid + 3 stop signal ይኮዱ። Code ትርፊ እዩ (degenerate) — ብዙሓት amino acid ብዙሕ codon ኣለዎም፣ መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ኣብ ሳልሳይ ቦታ ይፈላለዩ ("wobble")። ህይወት ኩሉ ማለት ይከኣል universal።
tigrinya.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: ሳልሳይ codon ቦታ ብዝወሓደ ጽንዓት ይጻመድ — ሓደ tRNA ብዙሕ codon ክፈሊ ይኽእል። ንዘድሊ ብዝሒ tRNA ይንኪ (cell ~30-40 ኣለዎ፣ 64 ኣይኮነን)።
tigrinya.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — ነፍሲ ወከፍ ሓድሽ helix ሓደ parental + ሓደ newly-synthesized strand ኣለዎ። Meselson-Stahl ብ1958 ኣርኣዩ። ኣብ ባክተርያ ~50 bp/ካልኢት፤ ኣብ eukaryote ኣብ fork ~50 bp/ካልኢት (ግን ኣሽሓት fork ብparallel)።
tigrinya.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase DNA template (3'→5') የንብብ mRNA (5'→3') ይሰርሕ። ኣብ eukaryote primary transcript ቅድሚ export ብዙሕ process ይግበረሉ።
tigrinya.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome mRNA ከም 3-base codon የንብብ protein ይሰርሕ። ኣብ ባክተርያ ~10-20 amino acid/ካልኢት፤ ኣብ eukaryote ~3-5። ብዙሓት ribosome ሓደ mRNA translate ክገብሩ ይኽእሉ (polyribosome)።
tigrinya.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation ካብ ዘይረኣዩ (silent) ክሳብ ቀተልቲ ይበጽሑ። ጽልዋኦም ኣብ ዝተቐየረ ነገር፣ ኣበይ፣ ን ኣብ ኣየናይ cell type ን ይምርኮስ።
tigrinya.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: ብጽቡቕ ዝተገለጹ ጀነቲክ ሕማማት ናሙና። ናይ ዘመናዊ genetic counseling ን therapy ን ጸጋታት እናዓበዩ እዮም — ንclinical ውሳነታት ናይ ሎሚ ጽሑፋት ርአ።
tigrinya.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: ስድራቤት A — ሰለስተ ወለዶታት፣ ሰማያዊ ኣዒንቲ
tigrinya.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: ክልተ ዘይተጠቕዑ ወለዲ (gen. I) ሓደ ዝተጠቕዐ + ሓደ ዘይተጠቕዐ ውሉድ ኣለዎም (gen. II)። ዝተጠቕዐ ውሉድ + ዘይተጠቕዐ መጻምድቲ ሓደ ዝተጠቕዐ + ሓደ ዘይተጠቕዐ ኣለዎም (gen. III)። እቲ ባህሪ ኣብ ~25% ደቂ ናይ ዘይተጠቕዑ cross ይረአ።
tigrinya.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: እቲ ባህሪ ወለዶታት ይዘልል (ዘይተጠቕዑ ወለዲ → ዝተጠቕዐ ውሉድ)።
tigrinya.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: ወለዲ heterozygous carrier ክዀኑ ኣለዎም፣ ነፍሲ ወከፍ ሓደ recessive allele የመሓላልፍ።
tigrinya.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: ዝተጠቕዑ ውልቀሰባት ኣብ ክልቲኡ ጾታ ብግምት ማዕረ frequency ይረኣዩ።
tigrinya.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: ዝተጠቕዐ = aa homozygous፤ carrier (Aa) phenotypically ዘይተጠቕዐ እዩ።
tigrinya.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: ስድራቤት B — ኣብ ሰለስተ ወለዶታት ናይ ሕብሪ ዕውርነት
tigrinya.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: ዝተጠቕዐ ኣቦሓጎ (gen. I) ዘይተጠቕዐት ጓል (gen. II) ን በታ ጓል ኣቢሉ ዝተጠቕዐ ጓል ወዲ ን (gen. III) ኣለዎ። ካብ ዘይተጠቕዐ ኣቦ ዝተጠቕዐ ወዲ የለን። እቲ ባህሪ ኣብ ደቂ ተባዕትዮ ብብዝሒ ይረአ።
tigrinya.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: እቲ ባህሪ ሓያል male bias የርኢ (hemizygous ተባዕትዮ የርእዩ፤ ኣንስትዮ 2 copy የድልዮም)።
tigrinya.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: ዘይተጠቕዐት ጓል ናይ ዝተጠቕዐ ኣቦሓጎ ብግድን carrier እያ።
tigrinya.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: እቲ ባህሪ ብcarrier ጓል ኣቢሉ ወለዶ ይዘልል፣ ደሓር ኣብ ጓል ወዲ ደጊሙ ይረአ።
tigrinya.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: father-to-son transmission የለን (ደቂ ተባዕትዮ Y ካብ ኣቦ ይወርሱ፣ X ኣይኮነን)።
tigrinya.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: ስድራቤት C — ከም Huntington ደንጒዩ ዝጅምር ባህሪ

tigrinya.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: ጥዑያት ንዘይኮኑ ባህርያት (ቁመት, IQ) ናይ embryo ግምታዊ ምርጫ ወይ ምስትኻኸል። ሕጂ ብtechnique ውሱን እዩ፤ ብስነ ምግባር ክትዕ።

tigrinya.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search cold case ፈትሐ (Golden State Killer, 2018) ግን ብዛዕባ ዘይተሰማምዑ ኣዝማድ privacy ሕቶ የልዕል።

tigrinya.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormone ብደም ኣቢሎም ናብ ርሑቕ target tissue ንምስራሕ ይጓዓዙ። metabolism, ዕብየት, reproduction, stress response, ን homeostasis ን የተሓባብሩ።
tigrinya.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: ግምታዊ elemental composition ናይ ኣካል ሰብ ብmass። 11 ንጥረ ነገር ጥራይ >99% እዮም። CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) ማለት ይከኣል organic molecule ኩሉ ይሰርሑ።
tigrinya.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: ናይ ቀረባ ግዜ ምጥፋእ (መብዛሕትኡ ብሰብ ዝተፈጥረ) + ፍሉጣት ጥንታዊ ምጥፋእ። መሬት 5 mass extinction ነይርዋ — ብዙሓት ሕጂ ኣብ 6ይ ኢና ይብሉ።
tigrinya.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + ብርሃን → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂። Chlorophyll ይንቀሳቕሶ። ናይ ከባቢ ኣየር oxygen እቲ ዝዓበየ ክፋል ምንጪ።
tigrinya.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (ብዙሓት ኣትክልቲ), C4 (ዕፉን, ሽኮር ኣገዳ — ኣብ ላዕለዋይ T ውጽኢታዊ), CAM (cactus, succulent — ማይ ንምዕቃብ stomata ለይቲ ይኸፍቱ)።
tigrinya.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: ኣብ ቆጽሊ ንኣሽቱ ነዃላት። CO₂ ክኣቱ + O₂/ማይ ክወጽእ ይገብሩ። ብብርሃን፣ ማይ፣ CO₂ መሰረት ይኽፈቱ/ይዕጸዉ።
tigrinya.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: ማይ + minerals ካብ ሱራት ንላዕሊ ይጸውር። ዋህዮታቱ ሞይቶም። transpiration pull ይፈጥር።

tigrinya.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormone ኣትክልቲ። Phototropism (ናብ ብርሃን ምዕባይ)። ብጽላሎት ሸነኽ concentration → ዋህዮታት ይነውሑ → ናብ ብርሃን ይዛነፉ።
tigrinya.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormone gas። ፍረ የብስል። ዝበሰለ ባናና ንኻልኦት ፍረ ስለምንታይ ከም ዘብስል። Stress signaling።
tigrinya.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: ናይ ጉንዲ ምንዋሕ፣ ናይ ዘርኢ ምብቃል፣ ዕምባባ ምፍራይ የተባብዕ።
tigrinya.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: ናይ cell division የተባብዕ። ናይ ቆጽሊ እርጋን የደናጒ።
tigrinya.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormone stress። ማይ ክውሕድ ከሎ stomata ይዓጹ። ናይ ዘርኢ ድቃስ የተባብዕ።
tigrinya.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ፍሉይ እዩ — ሓደ sperm egg cell (embryo) የዳቕል፣ እቲ ካልእ polar nuclei (endosperm — ናይ ዘርኢ ምግቢ) የዳቕል።
tigrinya.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: ቅርጺ ዕምባባ፣ ሕብሪ፣ መዓዛ ምስ ምርጫ pollinator ይሰማምዑ። ገሊኦም ኣዝዮም specialized (orchid + ፍሉይ ኣበራ)።
tigrinya.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: ኣብ ንጥረ ነገር ድኻ ሓመድ ተፈጥሩ። Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (ዝጠብቕ)።
tigrinya.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: ምስ fungi symbiosis። Fungi ናይ ሱር ተበጻሕነት የናውሑ፤ ተኽሊ ሽኮር ይህብ። ~85% ናይ plant species።
tigrinya.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: ኣብ root nodule Rhizobium ባክተርያ N₂ → NH₃ ይቕይሩ። ስለዚ እዩ ጥረምረ protein ዝበዝሖ + ሓመድ ዘመሓይሹ።
tigrinya.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Domestication ዓበይቲ ዘርኢ (ሩዝ), ዘይረግፉ (ስርናይ), ጥዑም ፍረ (ቱፋሕ) መሪጹ። ብቐረባ — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection።
tigrinya.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: ኣብ ኣትክልቲ ልሙድ (ኣብ እንስሳት ሳሕቲ)። ስርናይ hexaploid እዩ (6 set), strawberry octoploid እዩ። መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ vigor + yield ይውስኽ።
tigrinya.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: ኣብ cell wall ዕንጨይቲ ዘትርር compound። ስለዚ እዩ ዕንጨይቲ ተሪር + ቀስ ኢሉ ዝበስብስ።
tigrinya.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: ኣብ ሓደ ከባቢ ናይ ሓደ species ውልቀሰባት።
tigrinya.all_populations_interacting_in_an_area: ኣብ ሓደ ከባቢ ዝራኸቡ population ኩሎም።
tigrinya.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: ኣብ መሬት ዘለዉ ecosystem ኩሎም። ዞባ ህይወት።
tigrinya.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: ናይ ሓደ species ኣብ ecosystem ተራ። ክልተ species ሓደ niche ክሕዙ ኣይክእሉን (competitive exclusion)።
tigrinya.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: መን ንመን ከም ዝበልዕ network። Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → ወዘተ።

tigrinya.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: ዝሞተ ነገር ይሰብሩ። Fungi, ባክተርያ, decomposer። ንጥረ ነገራት recycle ይገብሩ።
tigrinya.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: ኣብ መንጎ species ናይ ቀረባ ርክብ። Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−)።

tigrinya.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: ውሑድ ዘርኢ፣ ብዙሕ ክንክን፣ ነዊሕ ዕድመ። ዓሳ ነባሪ, ሰብ, oak ገረብ።

tigrinya.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~1 species ኣብ ሚልዮን ዓመት። ናይ ሕጂ rate ብሰብ ምኽንያት 100-1000× background እዩ።

tigrinya.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: ናይ ንጥረ ነገራት (C, N, P, S) ብbiotic + abiotic compartment ምንቅስቓስ።

tigrinya.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis PCR ፈጠረ (1983)፤ ብ1993 Nobel ተዓወተ።
tigrinya.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: ካብ ውዑይ ምንጪ thermophilic bacterium። ናይ 95 °C denaturation step ይሓድር።
tigrinya.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye amplification real-time ይሕብሩ። ንCOVID test, gene expression ይጥቀም።
tigrinya.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR። ቅድም RNA ናብ cDNA ይቕይር። ንRNA virus (COVID, HIV, ጉንፋዕ) ይጥቀም።

tigrinya.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (ከም Jurassic Park፤ ብሓቂ መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ <1 ሚልዮን ዓመት)።
tigrinya.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: እታ ቀዳመይቲ CRISPR therapy FDA-approved (ታሕሳስ 2023)። ናይ patient stem cell ex vivo የስተኻኽል።

tigrinya.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library ኣየኖት gene ንሕማም essential ከም ዝኾኑ ይገልጽ።

tigrinya.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: ሕማም ዝጻወር ሩዝ, ቡናዊ ዘይኮኑ ቃንጥሻ, gluten-free ስርናይ (መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ ገና ኣብ መጽናዕቲ)።
tigrinya.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: መኻንነት ወይ malaria resistance ኣብ wild population የላብዑ። Field trial ገና ኣከራኻሪ።
tigrinya.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) human embryo ኣረመ → moral + scientific ቁጠዐ። ሕጂ ኣብ ብዙሓት ሃገራት ተኸልኪሉ።
tigrinya.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: ኣካል ሰብ ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell ኣለዎ። ብቁጽሪ ማለት ይከኣል ማዕረ።
tigrinya.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: 500-1,000+ bacterial species ኣብ ጥዕንኡ ዝሓለወ ዓቢ ሰብ መዓንጣ። ምስ archaea, fungi, virus።
tigrinya.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome ካብ human genome ~100× ተወሳኺ gene ይጸውር። ብዙሕ metabolic capability ይውስኽ።
tigrinya.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe ምስ ሓንጎል ብvagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite ይራኸቡ። ምስ mood, ባህሪ ተኣሳሲሮም — ግን ብዙሓት ፍሉያት ጠለባት ተጋኒኖም።
tigrinya.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic commensal ይድምስሱ → ምሕዋይ ኣዋርሕ/ዓመታት ክወስድ ይኽእል። ገለ shift ይቕጽሉ።
tigrinya.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) recurrent C. difficile infection ~90% ጉዳያት ይፍውስ። ካልኦት ኣጠቓቕማታት ገና experimental።
tigrinya.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: ብbody site ይፈላለ — ግንባር (ስብሓዊ, Cutibacterium acnes ይመርሕ), መዓንጣ (anaerobe), ትሽትሽ (apocrine ረሃጽ + ባክተርያ → ሽታ ኣካል)።
tigrinya.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: ጥዑይ — Lactobacillus ይመርሕ, ትሑት pH። ሚዛን ምዝባዕ → bacterial vaginosis (BV)።
tigrinya.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~700 species። ኣብ ናይ ስኒ ጉድጓድ, ናይ ድድ ሕማም ጽልዋ ይገብር። ምስ cardiovascular risk ተኣሳሲሩ።
tigrinya.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: ናይ ጭዋዳ ልደት ንህጻን maternal vaginal microbe ይዘርእ፤ C-section skin microbe። ናይ ነዊሕ ግዜ ጽልዋ ይጽናዕ ኣሎ (ገሊኡ ኣከራኻሪ)።
tigrinya.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) ፍሉይ gut microbe (B. infantis) ዝምግቡ ይሓዝ።
tigrinya.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg ይሓዋወሱ። Diploid zygote ይፍጠር።
tigrinya.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: ብዘይ ዕብየት ቅልጡፍ cell division። Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell።
tigrinya.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: ጥራይ ኩዕሶ ምስ inner cell mass (መጻኢ embryo) + trophoblast (መጻኢ placenta)።
tigrinya.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: ናይ cell ምንቅስቓስ 3 germ layer ይፈጥር — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm።
tigrinya.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube ካብ ectoderm ይፍጠር። መጻኢ ሓንጎል + spinal cord።
tigrinya.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: ቀንዲ ኣካላት ኩሎም ክፍጠሩ ይጅምሩ። ልቢ ~ሰሙን 4-5 ክሃርም ይጅምር።
tigrinya.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: ዕብየት + ብስለት። ቀንዲ structure ኣቐዲሞም ተፈጢሮም።
tigrinya.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell receptor ን constitutively ንactivate ናይ ገዛእ ርእሶም growth signal የፍርዩ።
tigrinya.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) inactivated → ዋህዮታት stop signal እኳ እንተ ሃለወ ይመቓቐሉ።
tigrinya.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway ተዓጊቶም። ዝተጎድኡ ዋህዮታት ክሞቱ ከለዎም ብህይወት ይነብሩ።
tigrinya.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Telomerase reactivate → telomere ይሕሎ → ዘይተደረተ division።
tigrinya.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor ዝዓቢ mass ንምምጋብ ናይ ደም ስራውር ይምልምል።
tigrinya.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: ዋህዮታት adhesion የጥፍኡ, ይስደዱ, ርሑቕ tissue colonize ይገብሩ።
tigrinya.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor oxygen እኳ እንተ ሃለወ glycolysis ይጥቀም።
tigrinya.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor ካብ immune surveillance ይሕባእ ወይ የዳኽም (PD-L1 expression)።
tigrinya.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: ስር ዝሰደደ inflammation ዝፈቅድ environment ይፈጥር።
tigrinya.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: ዝእከብ mutation + chromosomal rearrangement evolution ይመርሑ።
tigrinya.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: ቅልጡፍ, non-specific። ቆርበት, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage።
tigrinya.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: ደንጓዪ (መዓልትታት), ኣዝዩ specific, memory ኣለዎ። B cell (antibody) + T cell።
tigrinya.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Antibody የፍርዩ። ነፍሲ ወከፍ B cell ሓደ specificity ይሰርሕ። Activate ዝኾነ B cell plasma cell ይኸውን።
tigrinya.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Immune response የተሓባብሩ። target ናይ HIV። ካብ naive ናብ specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg) ይምርሑ።
tigrinya.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: ዝተለኽፉ ወይ cancerous ዋህዮታት ብperforin + granzyme ይቐትሉ።
tigrinya.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Y-ቅርጺ protein። 5 class — IgG (ኣዝዩ ብዙሕ), IgA (mucosa), IgM (ቀዳማይ), IgE (allergy + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface)።
tigrinya.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: antigen ንT cell ዘቕርቡ cell surface molecule። MHC I (ኩሎም ዋህዮታት, viral peptide)። MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide)።
tigrinya.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: ኣብ pathogen ነዃል ዝገብሩ + phagocyte ዝምልምሉ plasma protein።
tigrinya.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: ናይ immune system signaling molecule። Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (coordination), TNF (inflammation)።
tigrinya.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: ካብ ቀዳማይ exposure ነዊሕ ዕድመ ዘለዎም B + T cell። መሰረት ናይ vaccine + ናይ ህይወት ምሉእ immunity።
tigrinya.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: ብዘይ ሕማም adaptive immunity የሰልጥኑ። mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated።
tigrinya.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system ንርእሱ የጥቅዕ። Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto።
tigrinya.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity። Mast cell histamine ይልቅቁ።
tigrinya.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (ይቕበል), soma (cell body), axon (ይልእኽ), terminal (neurotransmitter ይልቅቕ)።
tigrinya.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal። Sodium ይኣቱ → depolarize → potassium ይወጽእ → repolarize። ~1 ms። ፍጥነት — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) ክሳብ ~100 m/s (myelinated)።
tigrinya.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: ብglia (oligodendrocyte ኣብ CNS, Schwann cell ኣብ PNS) ዝተሰርሐ ስብሓዊ insulation። conduction የቀላጥፍ። ኣብ MS ይበላሾ።
tigrinya.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: ኣብ መንጎ neuron junction። Electrical ወይ chemical (መብዛሕትኡ ግዜ)። Gap ~0.02 µm።
tigrinya.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: ኣብ synapse chemical messenger። Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine)።
tigrinya.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control። ኣብ Parkinson ትሑት፤ ኣብ schizophrenia dysregulated።
tigrinya.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, ድቃስ, ናይ ምግቢ ድሌት። SSRI reuptake target ይገብሩ።
tigrinya.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction። Memory + attention። ኣብ Alzheimer ትሑት።
tigrinya.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin ኣብ CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid)።
tigrinya.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — ኣተሓሳስባ, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (ስምዒት + memory)።
tigrinya.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: ሓንጎል ንርእሱ እንደገና የወደብ — ኣብ ቁልዕነት ሓያል እዩ, ግን ኣብ ህይወት ምሉእ ይቕጽል። መሰረት ናይ learning።
tigrinya.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: ኣብ መንጎ brain capillary cell tight junction ብዙሕ molecule ደገ የትርፉ። ንCNS drug delivery ዓቢ ጸገም።
tigrinya.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ኣብ ዕረፍቲ ~20% ናይ ኣካል ጸዓት (~2% mass እኳ እንተኾነ)። መብዛሕትኡ ንion gradient ዝሕሉ Na+/K+ pump።
tigrinya.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: ብብዝሒ ዝተመርሐ ቀዳማይ human protein። ብE. coli ተሰርሐ (1982)። ናይ ሓሰማ + ላም insulin ተኪኡ።
tigrinya.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy። Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy)።
tigrinya.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna)። Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application እናማዕበሉ እዮም።
tigrinya.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: ዝተበላሸዉ gene ይትክኡ። Luxturna (ዝተወርሰ ዕውርነት, FDA 2017)። Zolgensma (SMA, 2019)።
tigrinya.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: ዝተነደፉ immune cell። Yescarta + Kymriah ንblood cancer። ~$400,000 ኣብ dose።
tigrinya.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant ንዓመታት standard እዩ። newer iPSC + ESC approach ኣብ መጽናዕቲ።
tigrinya.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Tissue ብliving cell + scaffold print ምግባር። ቆርበት, cartilage, ኩሊት። ምሉኣት ኣካላት ገና ርሑቕ።
tigrinya.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Biological system ምንዳፍ። መድሃኒት ዝሰርሑ ባክተርያ, opioid ዝሰርሕ yeast, algal biofuel።
tigrinya.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A)።
tigrinya.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (ዝተበላሸዉ sample), Y chromosome (መስመር ኣቦ)። Database ንጽጽር።
tigrinya.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA)። biogeographic ancestry + DNA ኣዝማድ ይገልጽ።
tigrinya.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Cancer DNA ኣብ ደም detect ይገብር። ኣቐዲምካ ምፍላጥ, treatment monitoring።
tigrinya.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Solid tumor ምሕካም። TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved ብ2024።
tigrinya.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: ዝተነደፉ microbe ናይ ነዳዲ ፍሳስ, ናይ plastic ጓሓፍ, ከበድቲ ብረታት የጽርዩ።
tigrinya.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: ፍሉይ DNA sequence ቢልዮን ግዜ የብዝሕ። workhorse ናይ molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics።
tigrinya.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: መጀመርታ bacterial immune system, ሕጂ programmable gene-editing tool። Doudna + Charpentier Nobel 2020 ተማቐሉ።
tigrinya.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus non-living infectious agent እዮም — ንምርባሕ host cell የድልዮም። ብgenome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, ቅርጺ ይምደቡ።
tigrinya.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science ብቕልጡፍ እናማዕበለ እዩ። ብዙሓት ፍሉጣት ጠለባት (ፍሉይ probiotic strain ፍሉይ condition "ዝፍውስ") ካብ መርትዖ ይቕድሙ። ብሓያል ዝተደግሙ ውጽኢታት ተጣበቕ።
tigrinya.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: ብHanahan + Weinberg ተገልጸ (2000, ብ2011 ተመሓየሸ)። ብዙሕ cancer ብዙሕ ምልክታት ይረኽብ። Therapy ፍሉያት ምልክታት target ይገብር።
